overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through Night City. The scene features a futuristic cyberpunk urban environment with towering skyscrapers, neon advertisements, and holographic billboards. The car navigates through elevated highways, tunnels, and dense commercial districts with moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with waterway on side

events.description: approaching the entrance to a covered tunnel section

agents.ego_description: driving a futuristic convertible along an elevated highway, approaching a tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: white van driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with illuminated 'MILITECH' signage at the top
dark water canal running alongside the elevated highway
building with red and orange neon signage
concrete barrier with metal railing separating lanes
large covered tunnel entrance with structural supports

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated highway at night, driving toward a large tunnel entrance. The Militech building looms ahead with bright signage, while a waterway runs along the right side. Neon-lit buildings line the left side of the highway as the vehicle approaches the tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway tunnel with overhead lighting

events.description: entering the covered tunnel section with artificial lighting
approaching tunnel exit with bright daylight visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through a covered tunnel section with linear overhead lighting fixtures

entered.detail: dark metal and concrete tunnel ceiling with linear lighting fixtures
metal and glass barriers along the tunnel sides

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered tunnel with artificial overhead lighting, creating an enclosed driving environment. The tunnel features metal and glass barriers along the sides. As the segment progresses, bright daylight becomes visible at the tunnel exit ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street with tall buildings forming urban canyon

events.description: exiting tunnel into open urban canyon with sunlight filtering between buildings
stopping at intersection behind other vehicles waiting at crosswalk
accelerating through the intersection as traffic clears

agents.ego_description: driving through a sunlit urban canyon, stopping at an intersection, then proceeding through crosswalk

notable_agents.action: black car stopped ahead at the intersection

entered.detail: tall buildings forming a narrow canyon with sunlight filtering through
palm trees lining the street along the sidewalk
road intersection with yellow crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into a sunlit urban canyon between towering skyscrapers. Palm trees line the right sidewalk where pedestrians walk. The vehicle stops at an intersection behind other cars, then accelerates through the crosswalk as the segment continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with massive holographic advertisements and overpass

events.description: making a right turn at the intersection into a commercial street
driving under a large concrete overpass structure
navigating through moderate traffic with vehicles passing on the left

agents.ego_description: making a right turn and driving through a commercial district with large holographic billboards, passing under an overpass

notable_agents.action: green sports car passing on the left side

entered.detail: massive holographic advertisement displaying a blue female figure on building facade
elevated highway passing overhead creating partial cover
yellow safety barriers along the sidewalk edge
tall building with multiple illuminated advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The vehicle makes a right turn into a dense commercial district dominated by a massive holographic billboard of a blue woman on the left. The car drives under a large overpass structure, with yellow safety barriers lining the right side. Traffic increases as the vehicle navigates through the neon-lit street.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit street approaching distinctive circular building structure

events.description: emerging from under overpass into open street with circular building visible ahead
approaching large circular building with rotating holographic ring displays

agents.ego_description: driving toward a large circular building with rotating holographic advertisements, navigating through city traffic

entered.detail: distinctive cylindrical building with multiple levels and rotating holographic displays
large green illuminated digital advertisement screen
bright pink neon signs on building facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass, the vehicle drives toward a distinctive circular building with rotating holographic rings. The street is lined with bright pink neon signage and large digital billboards. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks as the vehicle approaches the unique cylindrical structure ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a neon-lit highway at night through a tunnel and into a sun-drenched, futuristic urban center. It begins on an elevated road passing the Militech building and a waterway before the camera enters a covered tunnel defined by artificial overhead lighting and glass barriers. As the vehicle emerges from the tunnel, the environment shifts abruptly from enclosure to a bright urban canyon of towering skyscrapers and palm trees, where the car pauses at a busy intersection. The scene then turns into a dense commercial district, passing under a massive overpass and beneath a giant holographic billboard of a blue woman. Finally, the vehicle navigates through streets lined with pink neon signage and digital billboards, heading toward a distinctive circular building with rotating holographic rings.
